author: mryzhov
title: RISCV64 Docker build fails - libpython3-dev:riscv64 has unresolvable dependencies on libtinfo6:riscv64
signature: apt-get install libpython3-dev:riscv64 fails - libpython3.10-stdlib:riscv64 depends on libtinfo6:riscv64 but not installable|Configuration

failed_jobs.name: Docker
failed_jobs.symptom: docker buildx build fails: apt-get install libpython3-dev:riscv64 exits with code 100 due to unresolvable cross-arch dependencies

key_errors: libpython3.10-stdlib:riscv64 : Depends: libncursesw6:riscv64 (>= 6.1) but it is not going to be installed
libpython3.10-stdlib:riscv64 : Depends: libtinfo6:riscv64 (>= 6) but it is not going to be installed
libreadline8:riscv64 : Depends: libtinfo6:riscv64 (>= 6) but it is not going to be installed
E: Unable to correct problems, you have held broken packages.

ERROR: failed to solve: process "/bin/sh -c dpkg --add-architecture riscv64 && apt-get update -o Dir::Etc::sourcelist=/etc/apt/sources.list.d/riscv64-sources.list && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends libpython3-dev:riscv64" did not complete successfully: exit code: 100
root_cause: Dockerfile step 11 (lines 72-74 of .github/dockerfiles/ov_build/ubuntu_22_04_riscv/Dockerfile) fails when installing libpython3-dev:riscv64 via cross-arch apt. The riscv64 package libpython3.10-stdlib:riscv64 requires libtinfo6:riscv64 (>=6) and libncursesw6:riscv64 (>=6.1), but these transitive dependencies cannot be resolved. The riscv64-sources.list contains duplicate amd64 entries already present in /etc/apt/sources.list, generating multiple warnings; combined with partial riscv64 repository coverage (missing jammy-updates/security for riscv64 universe), apt cannot find satisfiable versions for the riscv64 transitive deps. This failure has been recurring since this PR entered the merge queue.
recommended_actions: Add libtinfo6:riscv64 and libncursesw6:riscv64 explicitly to the apt install list in Dockerfile line 72-74 before installing libpython3-dev:riscv64

Add 'deb [arch=riscv64] http://ports.ubuntu.com/ubuntu-ports/ jammy-updates universe' and 'deb [arch=riscv64] http://ports.ubuntu.com/ubuntu-ports/ jammy-security universe' to riscv64-sources.list in the Dockerfile
Consider removing the duplicate [arch=amd64] entries from riscv64-sources.list (lines 1-10) since they duplicate /etc/apt/sources.list and may confuse apt dependency resolution
Test the Docker build locally before merging by running the docker buildx command against the modified Dockerfile
prevention_strategies: When modifying RISCV64 cross-compilation Dockerfiles, validate that all cross-arch package dependencies can be resolved by running a local docker build. Ensure riscv64 universe and security universe sources are included in riscv64-sources.list. Avoid duplicating amd64 entries already in the base image sources.
historical_context: Same failure pattern seen 3 times prior today: runs 29022024794 (13:58 UTC), 29023574901 (14:21 UTC), 29029047050 (15:32 UTC), all for PR #36774. This is the 4th occurrence.
